CustomField.formula: IF( NOT( ISBLANK(TEXT( Agency1TradingStyle__c )) ) , ROUND( IF( Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c / ( Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c + Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c + Agency3_EvaluationPointSum__c ) <> 0, Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c / ( Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c + Agency2_EvaluationPointSum__c + Agency3_EvaluationPointSum__c ), 0 ), 3 ), 0 )
CustomField.label: 代理店1_受注貢献比率
